title: Museum & Learning Center Visits - FEDERAL RESERVE BANK of NEW YORK
text:
Home > About the New York Fed > 

Museum & Learning Center Visits

The New York Fed offers educational visits to school and student groups as part of our economic education mission. Visit
Economic Education
to learn more.

Submit School Group Visit Request

School group requests

Educators from schools and student programs serving 7th grade and up may submit a request to visit the Museum and Learning Center. Each one- to two-hour visit offers an accessible and engaging learning experience to enhance economic and financial literacy and increase awareness of the roles and responsibilities of the Federal Reserve System and the New York Fed. Inclusion of a visit to the gold vault is not guaranteed and subject to change.

submit request

Availability is limited. Schools and programs within the Federal Reserve’s Second District (New York State; the 12 northern counties of New Jersey; Fairfield County, Connecticut; Puerto Rico, and the U.S. Virgin Islands) receive priority for scheduling.

School group schedule

Tuesday – Friday, 10:00 am and 1:00 pm, except Bank Holidays. Subject to change. Please note these days and times when planning a school group visit.

School group visit capacity

25 - 50 visitors (maximum)

Some program options may limit capacity.

School group visit cost

Free

Requirements

Each school group must have a confirmed, advance reservation to visit and must be accompanied by at least one adult educator/chaperone.

Printed tickets are required for entry.

Visitors aged 18 and older must also present a valid, government-issued ID with photo, such as a driver's license or passport. Students under the age of 16 are encouraged to present a school ID, if applicable. The name on the ID must match the name printed on the ticket. A picture of an ID will not be accepted.

Visitors should arrive 30 minutes early to allow time for security screening.

School visits begin promptly. Late arrivals may not be accepted.

Photography is not allowed.

Please limit the bags and belongings you bring to the museum.

The building is wheelchair accessible. Please contact us at
frbnytours@ny.frb.org
if your school group would like to request any available accommodations.

submit request

School Group Visits: Frequently Asked Questions
Do you have a question about bringing a school group to visit the New York Fed’s Museum and Learning Center? Learn more in our
School Group Visit FAQs.

GOLD VAULT

Facts About the New York Fed's Gold Vault
Gold custody is one of several financial services the Federal Reserve Bank of New York provides to central banks, governments, and official international organizations on behalf of the Federal Reserve System. Learn about the New York Fed's gold vault.
